item.title: Goth 2B Cosplay Transformation tutorial - YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : Cosplayer : https://www.instagram.com/yuzu.pyon Artist : https://www.instagram.com/yoracrab Thank you for your support on my Goth 2B post yesterday, here's a transformation video tutorial for those interested in the steps to get into Cosplay!! Let me know if you have any other questions! Have a great day all :D -Yuzu Music : BMTH - limousine

item.title: Hilarious Sunday meme dump of pure chaos
item.description:
1. This gold, not gonna lie
2. Sadly, this is true ladies
3
4. Dog is like OOOPS, GOOFED
5
6. Explain this please!
7
8
9
10. Self grilling meat
11. Look at this rando goofing at a cafe
12. Jack Sparrow walking simulator
13
14. GROND
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump, whole you were thoroughly entertained! I would like to share with you that I'm making a wacky game called Do Not Press The Button, and it's tone and style are kind of inspired by the Stanley Parable. But there are lots of stuff to do in there, for example JOINING THE CHAIR REVOLUTION! If you liked the humor in this dump, you would probably like the game. Please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Images of Note: Who turned the protests violent
item.description:
It's because people complaining about "Wokeness" don't care about "accuracy" or "realism" (see: Yasuke in the latest Assassin's creed, who was a real person), they literally don't want Women or Minorities to have any place in media or even just the historical narrative. Back in 2007, people didn't make a fuss because we didn't have this right wing "stop wokeness" bullshit, which is just a revival of the 1930s fascist war against "Degeneracy".
:O
owo
love how the last one looks like my cat.
I would imagine all of these sound like Joe Swanson.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii We're gonna commit crimes >:3
You know every single right wing "Common Sense anti-woke" commentator/comedian always has that look on their face, have you noticed that?
yeah.
Space Ostrich.
King Shark in Harley Quinn is 100% better than this one.
...because capitalism needs poverty to survive because without it, people cannot be forced to do grueling, often pointless labour for little or no money.
Observe them.
Where they going? On a Journey?
The whole point of the Cass report was not to reveal truth but to strip transgender people of basic rights and dignities to enforce gender norms through state and social violence. Oh and if you think this doesn't affect you? They will use the same language and strategies to take away your reproductive rights.
https://www.tiktok.com/@cel_edits/video/7052690904922246447?lang=en
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also Twitch? http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii

item.title: My father's legacy, the Delaware Copper Mine
item.description:
Back in 1977, my father purchased an old abandoned copper mine in Michigan's upper peninsula. It's located a few miles south of Copper Harbor. He opened it up for public tours in 1978, and it was his life's work. Sadly, he passed away last year. For a few months we were a little unsure of what would happen - my stepmom was in poor health and unable to run it. Thankfully, one of my sisters was able to buy it so that it could stay in the family. This is the entrance to the mine, one of three shafts that descend almost 1400ft. The mine is 9 levels deep, but only the first level as accessible. The lower 8 are completely flooded.
It's 100 steps to get down into the mine. Getting down there is easy, coming back up kinda sucks though. to the right of the steps is the remains of the original "skipway", where ore carts would be hauled.to the surface.
Have lunch in a copper mine! On my most recent visit, I was hoping to do some zoom meetings from here, but the WiFi wasn't hooked up yet.
The shaft continues down here, it's fenced off so no one tries to go swimming - although a couple of dive teams have gone down, and there's some pretty cool videos on YouTube.
An old rock drill. These were referred to as widowmakers. They were operated without any sort of water spray to keep dust down and respiratory health wasn't a big priority in the mid-1800's, so drill operators often developed severe silicosis.
Excavation was down at an upward angle and would often reach almost to the level above. Holes would be cut through to the next level for passing tools. You can see the water level here. The water is actually a little eerie to watch, it's dead still.
This is an area that was excavated, referred to as a stope.
Exploratory shafts were dug to search for branching in the copper veins.
Looking upward from shaft number 2, you can see a little daylight.
This is one of the larger stopes.
Another angle
Back up on the surface, some of the old machinery is on display. This is an industrial air compressor.
I'm not entirely sure what this is
Another pneumatic rock drill
One of the original mine carts
Part of the hoisting gear from the number 1 shaft house
There's also some really cool ruins of the old machinery houses. Built with stone from the shafts as they were being dug.
This is one of the engine houses, located further back on the property. My understanding is that this was the second engine house built. It was larger, and was built to service the number 2 and 3 shafts as they were being dug.
This is the remains of the first engine house. Walls have held up pretty well considering they were built around 1840
This is the main entrance to the first engine house.
My wonderful sister and her husband, the proud new owners. They're both genuinely good people and I'm blessed to have them in my life.
Over the years, my father raised a number of different animals (didn't raise his kids, but that's a story for another day). His favorites were his skunks, so it seems appropriate that in place of a cat tax, I'll pay a skunk tax instead. Thanks for reading. If you find yourself in the U.P., stop by the Delaware Copper Mine! EDIT: Wow, you guys are great! I went to bed with around 60 up votes, woke up to over 800! I feel thoroughly validated by fake Internet points! Really cool to hear how many of you have been to the mine, and thanks to everyone who has offered input on the unknown equipment! Also, I forgot to mention - Michigan Tech University is actually doing a summer geology program at the mine. There is a small mining pit on the property that was dug by early Native Americans. Copper from that mine has been identified in artifacts as far away as Greece. One group of students is researching the pit. Another group of students are researching the ruins of the machinery houses, putting together more detailed information about 1800's mining. It's a pretty cool program, and also provides the students with a Speech credit by having them spend time in the gift shop interacting with guests.
item.dc:creator: jamesvand

item.title: Meme Library: Volume 34
item.description:
Hello and welcome to another meme dump, my imgur friends. The screeching bird woman is here to drop off another volume of memes. Let us view them.
Probably got my own suite down there with all the absolutely terrible shit I've found funny in my life so far
As long as your adult responsibilities are taken care of, just let people fucken enjoy their hobbies, man
All the damn time. I can just visualize the friendship meter going into the red like I'm playing the Sims
Nope, can't come back from that one
The humor masks the pain
Just another day in 'Murica
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
s p o o k y t i m e
I'm sorry I don't understand??
Oh boy it's almost time
shit
mmm, breadsticks
that's a zoinks from me too, Scooby
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAnd that's all for this dump. I'll see you in the next one, my dear imgur friends. Until then, don't forget to stay awesome. Have a lovely weekend.
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: Finally, A Step In The Right Direction
item.description:
I hate tax season, but I especially hate TurboTax. Despite TT and many others offering free options for simple filings they make it nearly impossible to actually get filed for free. I did my Mom's taxes for years - retired, fixed income, no investments, standard deduction - and I don't think I ever got through without having to purchase or lose the couple of hours of work I'd already put in. Let you start, say it should be free, then use all kinds of tactics to wrestle you into paying. The idea of a government run filing option just makes sense. What would make even more sense would us just getting a bill every year and doing away with the nonsense but this is at least a step in the right direction. Original Article - https://fortune.com/2024/05/24/turbotax-free-customers-intuit-stock/
Well of course they don't care about free customers! But as I mentioned above they sure do try to convert those who start out with a free file into a paying customer so we know why the even offer that option.
LMAO!! ::: Intuit has long lobbied against efforts by the government to offer software for people to complete their tax returns online, calling it unnecessary because private companies already offer it for free. *Yes, possible, but wrestling with the f*in website to actually get that free filing is quite a battle.
item.dc:creator: divjnky

item.title: Happy Towel Day!
item.description: Towel Day is a celebration of the life and works of the inimitable Douglas Adams. Originally celebrated two weeks after his death on May 11, 2001, the “holiday” has grown in subsequent years. On Towel Day fans of the author wear towels as suggested in “Hitchhikers Guide to the Galaxy” to publicly identify one another. “A towel, it says, is about the most massively useful thing an interstellar hitchhiker can have. Partly it has great practical value - you can wrap it around you for warmth as you bound across the cold moons of Jaglan Beta; you can lie on it on the brilliant marble-sanded beaches of Santraginus V, inhaling the heady sea vapours; you can sleep under it beneath the stars which shine so redly on the desert world of Kakrafoon; use it to sail a mini raft down the slow heavy river Moth; wet it for use in hand-to- hand-combat; wrap it round your head to ward off noxious fumes or to avoid the gaze of the Ravenous Bugblatter Beast of Traal (a mindboggingly stupid animal, it assumes that if you can't see it, it can't see you - daft as a bush, but very ravenous); you can wave your towel in emergencies as a distress signal, and of course dry yourself off with it if it still seems to be clean enough. More importantly, a towel has immense psychological value. For some reason, if a strag (strag: non-hitch hiker) discovers that a hitch hiker has his towel with him, he will automatically assume that he is also in possession of a toothbrush, face flannel, soap, tin of biscuits, flask, compass, map, ball of string, gnat spray, wet weather gear, space suit etc., etc. Furthermore, the strag will then happily lend the hitch hiker any of these or a dozen other items that the hitch hiker might accidentally have "lost". What the strag will think is that any man who can hitch the length and breadth of the galaxy, rough it, slum it, struggle against terrible odds, win through, and still knows where his towel is is clearly a man to be reckoned with.”
item.dc:creator: BearcatFan

item.title: Backlogged memes (cropping is for suckers)
item.description:
Actually I don’t think these have any cropping issues but we shall see bc that would be a first
This is peak internet culture
Even more so tbh. I probably won’t get crushed by a dark magic user in a wild power grab but I have DEFINITELY been on the wrong end of a small town white dudes attention
That’s the advice I usually give but I don’t run an advice column for a reason
Yeah well she’s training too, every night, so you’re SOL my dude
Yeah why not he seems chill
Any rock can cause negative energy if you throw it hard enough!
If you don’t know this series…..go read it.
Next week the daycare is just taking a vacay. Too bad they said. Keep your kid at home they said. What the fuck am I supposed to do with him here????
This right here is my entire vibe
I wish I could
You can actually do this in like 3 hours with cookies in Texas. Just put them on your windshield
This is the closest I’ve ever come to going viral and the comments are hilarious. This one lady was lecturing me about how a toddler shouldn’t be breastfeeding still. Total whoosh.
To be completely fair. The way they phrased this made it sound very positive when it definitely isn’t
Idk what this is but it’s rad.
More like preheating your cooch amirite
I should write this book
Are they not? Have I been making basketballs wrong?
I wanna say @PyroDragon did the commentary?
Oh, I’m looking
My body wants revenge, chocolate, and a nap. Basically those 3 things 24/7. And then of course there’s my mind which is just constantly screaming MAKE IT STOP
Ooooooo yes please
This dragon is my husband reincarnated.
….mmmmyello?
Is this a terminator?
Fantastic work by the species. A+.
Yes.
It was Eddie from IT thinking that btw. I’m reading IT and damn is it good. Like wasaaay better than I expected.
Why would anyone have pants on in their own house
Love the pun so much
I’d have very good yelp reviews. But also prison.
I run in a lot of reader circles and let me tell you. This is absolutely true. Very unrealistic that nobody wanted to bang this guy.
Promotion.
It never makes me feel better and yet I always do it. Like. Watch this. I’ve been super depressed lately, I think my new meds aren’t working, and it feels like everything is pointless and no one gives a shit if I finish my books and book covers or not. See? It did nothing.
It is actually
AI is coming for all the wrong jobs. Like gurl take out my trash for me so I can write my own books.
I want all of them
This is Late Nights with the Devil btw and it sucked total ass. So disappointed.
Daaaaaaaaamn
Sleepovers do be like that.
It’s true. But also. You must.
That’s my time, maybe there will be more, who gives a shit, everything I do is a pointless waste of time and my toddler is draining the life out of me, goodnight y’all

item.title: Keep your pets safe!
item.description: Fourth of July is around the corner, and it's one of the most common days where pets go missing, but people also like to set off fireworks leading up to the fourth of July. Keep your pets safe & indoors, but you can also speak with your vet regarding anxiety meds. Don't feel shy to ask for a paper script either, Gabapentin & Trazodone (some of the more common medications) can be purchased cheaper through human pharmacies than most vets or even cheaper than pet pharmacies like Chewy.com or 1800petmeds (and GoodRx can help you shop around to look at pricing options).
item.dc:creator: Raeya

item.title: Last surviving member of '60's group Iron Butterfly passes
item.description: Doug Ingle, Co-Founder a of the classic acid rock band Iron Butterfly, and author of their Mega-hit "In-A-Godda-Da-Vida" has died at age 78. Rock in peace, Doug.
